description_long: This is a cylindrical metal trash bin with a removable, slightly domed lid featuring a central top-mounted handle. The body of the bin is vertically ribbed for structural strength and has a weathered, dark gray finish with subtle greenish patches, suggesting outdoor use and exposure to the elements. Two robust, external side-mounted handles are attached near the top rim, allowing for easy lifting and transport. The lid fits snugly over the opening and is secured by the weight of the metal and the design of the rim. The bin appears to be made primarily of galvanized steel, giving it a hard, durable surface suitable for urban environments. Faint stenciled text reading 'AREA' is visible on the side, indicating some form of labeling or designation.
description: A weathered, cylindrical metal trash bin with a domed removable lid, ribbed sides, and sturdy side handles. Subtle greenish patches and faint labeling suggest outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the domed lid with a top handle and a prominent front handle below the rim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting both external side-mounted handles and faint 'AREA' labeling on the upper body.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the domed lid and a handle visible, but no labeling apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing both side handles and the 'AREA' label, mirroring view 1.
attribute_handle_design: external side-mounted handles and a top-mounted lid handle
attribute_labeling_or_signage: faint stenciled 'AREA' label on the side
